query:
SELECT id, name, email, createdAt FROM users ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 20;

SELECT DATE(createdAt) as signup_date, COUNT(*) as signups FROM users GROUP BY DATE(createdAt) ORDER BY signup_date DESC LIMIT 14;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3XWfTC2fh8LVhku.root --database ALJHDNsuNA7bExFuoQZUsx --execute SELECT id, name, email, createdAt FROM users ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 20;

SELECT DATE(createdAt) as signup_date, COUNT(*) as signups FROM users GROUP BY DATE(createdAt) ORDER BY signup_date DESC LIMIT 14;
